measurement_note: Size is mn, the number of character-position pairs. Both strings have equal length L; s is all 'a' and t differs only at its final character. The sparse mismatch lets a correct start-pair extension algorithm scan to the end for nearly every pair, exercising O(mn min(m,n)) work. The Accepted rolling dynamic program and an independent left/right formulation take O(mn) time. The slower implementation completes all L=8/24/64 tiers and is rejected only by scaling.
